zh.Evangelische Kirche, Hagsfeld, Karlsruhe: 巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Weber於1600年3月9日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德時，他的父親Bastian Weber44歲，母親Anna Weylund41歲。他於1616年4月6日與Anna Sigel在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年10月29日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林特海姆享年39歲，埋葬在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Weber于1600年3月9日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德时，他的父亲Bastian Weber44岁，母亲Anna Weylund41岁。他于1616年4月6日与Anna Sigel在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年10月29日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林特海姆享年39岁，埋葬在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧。

nameMeanings.name: Weber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

variants.name: Wieber
meanings: German:
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘battle, war’ + berht ‘bright’, ‘famous’.
southwestern form of   Weber  .

variants.name: Webert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
German: variant of   Weber  .

variants.name: Waber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Isadore.  German Hans, Kurt.
German: from a Silesian dialect form for   Weber   ‘weaver’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaver
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Veber
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic), Slovenian, Croatian, Serbian, and Czech; Hungarian (Véber); Slovak (also Véber): occupational name for a weaver, of German origin (see Weber ), often applied as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic occupational names or surnames.

variants.name: Weeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Dieter.
German: variant of   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Wever
meanings: North German and Dutch: occupational name for a weaver, Middle Low German wever, Middle Dutch wever(e). Compare Weber .
English: variant of   Weaver  .

variants.name: Textor
meanings: German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Weber or Wever , from Latin textor ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaber
meanings: Americanized form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Cecile, Marcel.
French: altered form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’. This surname is rare in France. In the US, it is found mainly in LA.
History: This surname was brought to LA by Jean Baptiste Webre born 1725 or 1727 in Alsace, France, died 1787 in LA. His ancestors were from Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Johannes .

variants.name: Hansel
meanings: Pet form of   Johannes .

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Weber was born on 9 March 1600, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, his father, Bastian Weber, was 44 and his mother, Anna Weylund, was 41. He married Anna Sigel on 6 April 1616, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 October 1639, in Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 39, and was buried in Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Weber est né le 9 mars 1600, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Bastian Weber, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Anna Weylund, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Anna Sigel le 6 avril 1616, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1639, à Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Weber am 9. März 1600 in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bastian Weber 44 und seine Mutter Anna Weylund 41. Er hat am 6. April 1616 in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Anna Sigel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1639 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden und wurde in Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Weber è nato il il 9 marzo 1600 nel Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, il suo padre, Bastian Weber, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Anna Weylund, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Anna Sigel il 6 aprile 1616, nel Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1639, nel Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germania.

ja.Evangelische Kirche, Hagsfeld, Karlsruhe: バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルド
ja.lifeSummary: Hans Weberが1600年3月9日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルドで生まれた時，父Bastian Weberは44歳，母Anna Weylundは41歳であった。1616年4月6日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘハグスフエルドでAnna Sigelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年10月29日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘリンスエイムで39歳で死去し，ドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Weber(이)가 1600년 3월 9일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bastian Weber(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Weylund(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1616년 4월 6일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 Anna Sigel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 10월 29일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 린테임에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤에 묻혔다.

mn.9 March 1600–29. Oktober 1639: 1600 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 9–1639 оны Аравдугаар сарын 29

pt.9 March 1600–29. Oktober 1639: 9 de março de 1600–29 de outubro de 1639
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Weber nasceu em 9 de março de 1600, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Bastian Weber, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Anna Weylund, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Sigel em 6 de abril de 1616, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1639, em Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Weber родился 9 марта 1600 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, его отцу по имени Bastian Weber было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Weylund, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Sigel 6 апреля 1616 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 октября 1639 г. в местности ринтим, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия.

es.9 March 1600–29. Oktober 1639: 9 de marzo de 1600–29 de octubre de 1639
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hans Weber nació el 9 de marzo de 1600, en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, su papá, Bastian Weber, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Anna Weylund, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Anna Sigel el 6 de abril de 1616, en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1639, en Rintheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemania.
